raw_consumer_statement: My Citi credit card was used at a XXXX XXXX for {$1000.00}. That was almost XXXX  months ago. I have talked to the fraud department at Citi more times than I can count and they ask me the same questions every time and say they are still investigating. I decided finally to call the hotel and the lady I talked to said she sent the fraud paperwork in herself in XXXX but would send it in again. She said the card was ran 5 times before it went through. ( I always kept my card locked because I didnt use it often but had used it during that time to purchase some XXXX XXXX  from a college kid that came to my house to do a presentation ). She also said she has his signature on file where he signed. I blame the hotel really for even accepting a card with someone elses name on it and Citi is not doing anything about this and is now putting late charges on my account. I have since closed the XXXX cards I had with them because I do not trust that they protect their customers from fraud.
